%% defn rlookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXvarXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow   \tau   \dashv   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_var\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXlogXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \Delta , \mathsf{log}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow   \ottnt{ce}   \dashv   \Delta , \mathsf{log}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_log\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXresXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \Delta , \mathsf{res}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}^{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow   \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}   \dashv   \Delta , \mathsf{res}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}^{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_res\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
  \Delta ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv   \Delta' ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_skip\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
  \Delta , \mathsf{log}\;  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv   \Delta' , \mathsf{log}\;  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_skip\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
  \Delta , \mathsf{res}\;  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}^{ \ottnt{u} }  \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv   \Delta' , \mathsf{res}\;  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}^{ \ottnt{u} }  \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_skip\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  X  \dashv  \Delta' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXvarXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXlogXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXresXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXskipXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rctx_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \cdot   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \; \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{eff}  \ottsym{]} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \Delta , \mathsf{log}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce'}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \; \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{eff'}  \ottsym{]}  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \; \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{eff}  \ottsym{]} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \Delta , \mathsf{res}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}^{ \ottnt{u} }  \ottnt{ce}  \mathord{@}  \ottnt{ce'}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrctxXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJrlookup}{
\ottdefnrlookup{}\ottdefnrctxXXwf{}}

\ottdefnsJtype
\ottdefnsJcore
\ottdefnsJelaborate
\ottdefnsJmatch
\ottdefnsJrlookup
